features: Perfect Gift Packaging: Includes 12 mini gift boxes (7× 5× 7 cm), ideal for wrapping small treats, jewelry, candles, or party favors. A charming choice for weddings, birthdays, baby showers, and other celebrations.
Elegant Design with Ribbons: Each box comes with a matching satin ribbon for easy assembly and a polished, stylish presentation—no additional wrapping required!
Premium Quality Material: Crafted from sturdy, high-quality cardboard, these boxes provide reliable support for small gifts while maintaining a luxurious appearance.
Easy to Assemble: Delivered flat for convenient storage; quick and simple to fold into shape. The pre-cut ribbons make tying beautiful bows effortless.
Versatile and Multi-Purpose: Ideal for gift packaging, party favors, or DIY crafts. Perfect for showcasing small presents like chocolates, candy, trinkets, or keepsakes.
